title: HONG PAIKIK DING KA UM HI

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Puanpaaksilh minih in nungzuite hehnem hi
Lung zuang kha peuhmah kei un
Tu a ki lato Zeisu in
Van a kah namuh bangin hong kumkik ding

sections.label: Chorus
lines: A gen bang hong paikik ding ka um hi
Misite phong ding cih ka um hi
A gen bang hong pai kik ding ka um hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Tuni zong hi thei hi tuhun zong hithei hi
Leitungin hup zo nawn lo ding
Van kimlai ah laktohna ngah ding uh hi
